retrieved_episodes.name: DETECTED_WITH
retrieved_episodes.content: ThermalVibrationCascade pattern was detected on Machine-03 with confidence 0.78 and CRITICAL severity, with temperature reaching 426°C, vibration RMS 5.25 mm/s, and current draw 507.5 A.

reasoning: Machine-03 has experienced the ThermalVibrationCascade pattern repeatedly within a narrow time window on 2026-01-01, with four documented occurrences showing consistent peak signatures. The current match at 00:07:17 aligns precisely with historical detections at 00:07:17, 00:08:04, 00:13:39, and 00:15:35, all exhibiting temperature in the 422–426 °C range, vibration RMS between 5.15–5.47 mm/s, and current draw between 496–515 A. This recurrence pattern on the same machine with identical sensor cascade characteristics indicates a systematic, reproducible failure mode rather than a transient anomaly.
confidence_anchors: Prior ThermalVibrationCascade detection on Machine-03 at 2026-01-01T00:07:17.658Z with peak temperature 424.4 °C, vibration RMS 5.40 mm/s, current 515.9 A—exact match to current pattern
Second occurrence at 2026-01-01T00:08:04.855Z with CRITICAL severity, temperature 422.4 °C, vibration RMS 5.15 mm/s, current 515.4 A
Third occurrence at 2026-01-01T00:13:39.530Z with temperature 424.4 °C, vibration RMS 5.47 mm/s, current 496.3 A over 3-second cascade window
Fourth occurrence at 2026-01-01T00:15:35.206Z with temperature 422.8 °C, vibration RMS 5.44 mm/s, current 513.4 A
Prior alert at 2026-01-01T00:07:00.586Z documented confidence 0.78 for identical pattern with temperature 426 °C, vibration RMS 5.25 mm/s, current 507.5 A
alert_text: CRITICAL: ThermalVibrationCascade pattern confirmed on Machine-03 (rolling mill) with temperature 424.4 °C, vibration 5.40 mm/s RMS, and current draw 515.9 A. This is the fourth occurrence of this exact cascade signature within 8 minutes, indicating a persistent thermal-mechanical coupling failure. Recommend immediate inspection of bearing assembly and lubrication system, followed by thermal imaging to identify localized heat sources.
